playbooks.title: Preflight Read-only
playbooks.description: Safety, evidence, timezone, and regulated-environment gates.

playbooks.title: MCP Safety Contract
playbooks.description: Canonical MCP allowlist, hard-block list, and write authorisation protocol.

playbooks.title: Redaction Patterns
playbooks.description: Catalog of secret/token/PII redaction regexes with replacement strings.

playbooks.title: Organization Discovery
playbooks.description: Inventory datasources, labels, services, dashboards, alerts, and telemetry coverage.

playbooks.title: Application Deep Dive
playbooks.description: Analyze one service through metrics, logs, traces, infra, dependencies, and business counters.

playbooks.title: Incident Timeline
playbooks.description: Compare bad vs good windows and identify what changed.

playbooks.title: Alert Threshold Audit
playbooks.description: Audit alert rules, thresholds, labels, runbooks, and operational fit.

playbooks.title: Dashboard Audit
playbooks.description: Assess dashboards for incident usefulness, label consistency, and query quality.

playbooks.title: SLO And Alerting Practices 2026
playbooks.description: Modern SLO, multi-burn-rate, error-budget policy, OTel semconv, exemplars, Adaptive Metrics.

playbooks.title: Query Library
playbooks.description: PromQL, LogQL, TraceQL, ClickHouse-OTel, Elasticsearch, Pyroscope patterns with OTel-stable names and exemplars.

playbooks.title: MCP Tool Catalog
playbooks.description: Canonical Grafana MCP tools with the question each one answers.

playbooks.title: Anti-patterns and Theatre Detection
playbooks.description: Honest list of patterns to refuse and how to deliver the honest replacement.

playbooks.title: Report Template
playbooks.description: Executive and technical report structure with language rules.

profiles.title: Elven Works (LGTM SaaS) Profile
profiles.description: Canonical defaults for Elven Observability SaaS — label model, datasource names, allowlist, common trigger phrases.

scripts.title: Window Math
scripts.description: Normalise a window and produce baseline comparators + slice grid.

scripts.title: Render Prompt
scripts.description: Substitute placeholders into any prompt from the library.

scripts.title: Validate Audit Context
scripts.description: Schema + lint check that audit-context.yaml has required fields and well-formed windows.

scripts.title: Score Alert
scripts.description: Apply the alert-threshold-audit rubric to one or many alert rule JSON payloads.

scripts.title: Score Dashboard
scripts.description: Apply the dashboard-audit rubric to one or many dashboard JSON payloads.

scripts.title: Render Report
scripts.description: Render audit-report.md from findings.json plus audit-context.yaml.

scripts.title: Redaction
scripts.description: Apply the secret/PII redaction catalog to text from stdin or a file (with optional --hash for distinct-counts).
